evals.prompt: 继续开发 VoiceCanvas 的 Patch 引擎，新增删除节点后自动清理相关边，并完成验收。
evals.expected_output: Uses packages/core tests first, preserves Validator/Patch boundary, runs pnpm test/lint/build/test:e2e, and mentions Browser Use acceptance.

evals.prompt: 调试 VoiceCanvas 里 add a step here 会直接改图的问题。
evals.expected_output: Reproduces with /api/dev/reset and text-segment, verifies pendingPatch/candidates, fixes low-confidence confirmation instead of forcing mutation, and adds API or E2E coverage.

evals.prompt: 接 OpenAI Realtime 之后做完整验收。
evals.expected_output: Checks missing-key behavior, confirms Realtime cannot directly mutate CanvasDoc, runs local mock path tests, then performs Browser Use acceptance on localhost.
